title.ko: 스파크 갭; 스파크 갭을 사용하는 과전압 피뢰기; 스파크 플러그; 코로나 장치; 비밀폐 가스로 유입되기 위한 이온 발생(과전합 보호회로 H02H )
title.en: SPARK GAPS; OVERVOLTAGE ARRESTERS USING SPARK GAPS; SPARKING PLUGS; CORONA DEVICES; GENERATING IONS TO BE INTRODUCED INTO NON-ENCLOSED GASES (overvoltage protection circuits H02H)

definition.ko: 스파크 갭 회전 H01T7/00 보조 트리거 수단을 포함하는 것 H01T2/00 특수 적용 : 발진용; 정류기용 H01T9/00; H01T11/00 과전압 피뢰기; 아크 호른 H01T4/00 기타 스파크 갭 H01T14/00 세부 H01T1/00 스파크 플러그 H01T13/00 회로 H01T15/00 코로나 방전 장치 H01T19/00 제조, 유지 보수 H01T21/00 이온 생성 장치 H01T23/00

title.ko: 스파크 갭의 세부
title.en: Details of spark gaps
Means for extinguishing arc
using magnetic blow-out
with permanent magnet
using flow of arc-extinguishing fluid
with extinguishing fluid evolved from solid material by heat of arc
Means structurally associated with spark gap for recording operation thereof

title.ko: 정전이 날 경우에 대비하여, 과부하 또는 접속차단을 위해 스파크 갭과 구조적으로 연결된 장치 (H01T 1/15, H01T 1/16, H01T 1/18우선 ; 스파크 갭 피뢰기를 위한 비상보호회로 장치 H02H 7/24)
title.en: Means structurally associated with spark gap for protecting it against overload or for disconnecting it in case of failure (H01T0001150000, H01T0001160000, H01T0001180000 take precedence;emergency protective circuit arrangements for spark gap arresters H02H0007240000)
for protection against excessive pressure
Series resistor structurally associated with spark gap
Electrolytic device structurally associated with spark gap
Means for starting arc or facilitating ignition of spark gap
by the shape or the composition of the electrodes

title.ko: 전극을 위한 재료의 선택(1/22가 우선)
title.en: Selection of materials for electrodes (H01T0001220000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 보조적인 트리거 수단을 포함한 스파크 갭 (트리거링 회로 H01T 15/00)
title.en: Spark gaps comprising auxiliary triggering means (triggering circuits H01T0015000000)
comprising a trigger electrode or an auxiliary spark gap

title.ko: 스파크 갭을 사용한 과전압 피뢰기(2/00이 우선; 스파크 갭을 사용하는 과전압 보호회로 H02H 9/06)
title.en: Overvoltage arresters using spark gaps (H01T0002000000 takes precedence;overvoltage protection circuits using spark gaps H02H0009060000)
Details

title.ko: 하우징(4/06이 우선)
title.en: Housings (H01T0004060000 takes precedence)
Mounting arrangements for a plurality of overvoltage arresters

title.ko: 보호장치와 구조적으로 조합되어 있는 것(스위치가 부착된 것 H01H 9/14; 퓨즈가 부착된 것 H01H 85/44)
title.en: structurally associated with protected apparatus (with switches H01H0009140000;with fuses H01H0085440000)

title.ko: 단일 갭 또는 평행의 복수갭을 가지는 것
title.en: having a single gap or a plurality of gaps in parallel
hermetically sealed

title.ko: 아크 혼(절연체와 조합된 것 H01B 17/46)
title.en: Arcing horns (associated with insulators H01B0017460000)
having a plurality of gaps arranged in series
Arrangements for reducing height of stacked spark gaps
Arrangements for improving potential distribution
Rotary spark gaps, i.e. devices having one or more rotating electrodes
Spark gaps specially adapted for generating oscillations
Spark gaps specially adapted as rectifiers

title.ko: 스파크 플러그
title.en: Sparking plugs
Details
Means providing electrical connection to sparking plugs
combined with interference suppressing or shielding means
Covers forming a part of the plug and protecting it against adverse environment
Mounting, fixing, or sealing of sparking plugs, e.g. in combustion chamber
by bayonet-type connection
Means on sparking plugs for facilitating engagement by tool or by hand
Means for self-cleaning
Means for dissipating heat
Means for heating, e.g. for drying

title.ko: 전극 또는 절연체의 형성에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by features of the electrodes or insulation

title.ko: 절연체에 매립된 두개 이상의 전극을 가지는 것(두개이상의 스파크 갭을 가지는 스파킹 플러그 H01T 13/46 )
title.en: having two or more electrodes embedded in insulation (sparking plugs having two or more spark gaps H01T0013460000)

title.ko: 가동전극이 있는 것(13/28이 우선)
title.en: having movable electrodes (H01T0013280000 takes precedence)
for adjusting spark gap otherwise than by bending of electrode
having spherically shaped electrodes, e.g. ball-shaped
mounted so as to permit free movement
characterised by features of the earthed electrode
characterised by the mounting of electrodes in insulation, e.g. by embedding
characterised by the joint between insulation and body, e.g. using cement
Selection of materials for insulation
Selection of materials for electrodes

title.ko: 다른 장치와 구조적으로 결합되어 있는 것(연료분사장치와 결합되고 또는 조합되어 있는 것 F02M 57/06; 내연기관의 다른 부품과 구조적으로 결합되어 있는 것 F02P 13/00)
title.en: structurally combined with other devices (combined or associated with fuel injectors F02M0057060000;structurally combined with other parts of internal-combustion engines F02P0013000000)
with interference suppressing or shielding means
with magnetic spark generators
with transformers, e.g. for high-frequency ignition
having two or more spark gaps
having means for rendering sparks visible

title.ko: 갭의 이온화를 위한 수단이 있는 것(13/52가 우선)
title.en: having means for ionisation of gap (H01T0013520000 takes precedence)
characterised by a discharge along a surface
having electrodes arranged in a partly-enclosed ignition chamber
characterised by having component parts which are easily assembled or disassembled

title.ko: 검사 (내연 기관 점화시 스파크 특성을 검사하는 것 F02P17/12)
title.en: Testing (testing characteristics of the spark in internal-combustion engine ignition F02P0017120000)
of electrical properties

title.ko: 그룹 2/00～ 13/00에 분류되지 않는 스파크 갭 (코로나 방전을 발생시키기 위한 장치 19/00)
title.en: Spark gaps not provided for in groups H01T0002000000-H01T0013000000 (devices providing for corona discharge H01T0019000000)

title.ko: 스파크 갭을 위해 특히 적합한 회로, 예. 점화회로 (내연기관을 위한 점화회로 F02P; 연소장치을 위한 전기적 스파크 점화 F23Q; 스파크 갭을 사용한 보호회로 H02H 9/06)
title.en: Circuits specially adapted for spark gaps, e.g. ignition circuits (ignition circuits for internal-combustion engines F02P;electric spark ignition for combustion apparatus F23Q;protection circuits using spark gaps H02H0009060000)

title.ko: 코로나방전을 발생시키기 위한 장치(전자사진요소의 대전을 위한 것 G03G 15/02)
title.en: Devices providing for corona discharge (for charging electrographic elements G03G0015020000)
Corona rings
having pointed electrodes

title.ko: 스파크 갭 또는 스파크 플러그의 제조 또는 보수를 위하여 특히 적합한 장치 또는 방법
title.en: Apparatus or processes specially adapted for the manufacture or maintenance of spark gaps or sparking plugs

title.ko: 스파크 플러그에 관한 것
title.en: of sparking plugs

title.ko: 청정(자동세척을 위한 수단 H01T 13/14; 스파크 플러그의 청정을 위한 연마제 취부장치 B24C 3/34)
title.en: Cleaning  (means for self-cleaning H01T0013140000; abrasive blasting devices for cleaning sparking plugs B24C0003340000)

title.ko: 스파크 갭의 조정(갭조정용 가동전극을 가진 스파크 플러그 13/26)
title.en: Adjustment of spark gaps (sparking plugs having movable electrodes for adjusting the gap H01T0013260000)
Apparatus for generating ions to be introduced into non-enclosed gases, e.g. into the atmosphere
